summary: Iteration 9 - Full Visual Port Testing COMPLETE. All homepage sections verified: Hero (gradient text, FluidShape, CTAs), KeywordMarquee, TransitionSection, PhilosophySection, AceEngineSection (4 capability cards), AceSquadsSection (3 pillar cards), AceLoop (3 process steps), CTASection, Footer. ContactModal opens on 'Start a Project' click. Navbar with scroll-aware backdrop-blur, mobile menu toggle. /stacks page loads with dark mode and 4 blog posts. /stacks/[slug] loads individual posts. /admin loads Payload CMS login. /go/test redirects to google.com with 302.

issues: When mobile menu is open, Hero CTA buttons are still visible behind the menu, creating visual overlap with duplicate 'Start a Project' buttons

posts: Case Study: Affiliate Revenue Engine for SaaS
Field Notes: First 90 Days with a New Tech Stack
